aries.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Aries today.
aries.deploy_today: Maybe — The stars are ambiguous. Just like your acceptance criteria.
aries.prophecy: The cosmos are quiet today. Your Slack notifications are not. They never are.

taurus.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Taurus today.
taurus.deploy_today: No — Cosmic silence is a sign. So is the fact that tests are failing.
taurus.prophecy: The universe asks you to trust the process. The process has been 'in review' for three days.

gemini.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Gemini today.
gemini.deploy_today: Maybe — Two halves of you want to ship. One says yes. One says absolutely not.
gemini.prophecy: The stars suggest balance between work and rest. You will choose neither and just scroll GitHub instead.

cancer.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Cancer today.
cancer.deploy_today: No — Emotional stability is required for deploys. Today is not that day.
cancer.prophecy: The cosmos offer gentle comfort. Your prod environment does not know what comfort means.

leo.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Leo today.
leo.deploy_today: Yes — Leo ships confidently. Someone has to. Might as well be you.
leo.prophecy: The stars say your brilliance will be recognized. Your PR has been open for two weeks. Nobody has looked.

virgo.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Virgo today.
virgo.deploy_today: No — You found 11 things to improve before shipping. You always do.
virgo.prophecy: The cosmos whisper that perfection is the enemy of done. You will refactor anyway. You always refactor anyway.

libra.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Libra today.
libra.deploy_today: Maybe — You've been weighing the pros and cons since 9am. The standby window closes at noon.
libra.prophecy: The stars encourage decisive action. You will open five tabs comparing deployment strategies and close them all.

scorpio.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Scorpio today.
scorpio.deploy_today: Yes — Scorpio deploys in the dark. Preferably at 11pm on a Thursday.
scorpio.prophecy: The stars say secrets will surface today. They are talking about that hardcoded API key from 2023.

sagittarius.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Sagittarius today.
sagittarius.deploy_today: Yes — Adventure awaits. So does the rollback script, just in case.
sagittarius.prophecy: The cosmos say aim high and trust the journey. Your CI pipeline has other plans.

capricorn.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Capricorn today.
capricorn.deploy_today: Yes — You've planned for every scenario. Every scenario except that one.
capricorn.prophecy: Hard work pays off, say the stars. Your Jira velocity chart says something completely different.

aquarius.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Aquarius today.
aquarius.deploy_today: Maybe — Your revolutionary approach is compelling. Unfortunately, it runs on Node 12.
aquarius.prophecy: The stars say you are ahead of your time. Your microservices architecture diagram agrees. No one else does.

pisces.horoscope_text: The cosmos are quiet for Pisces today.
pisces.deploy_today: No — You had a dream about this deploy. It did not end well.
pisces.prophecy: The cosmos invite deep reflection today. You will reflect deeply on why that function is returning undefined.
